title: Department Manager Vacancy at Om Book Shop Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Om Book Shop Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Om Book Shop Capital India in Bengaluru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Om Book Shop Capital India:
Om Book Shop Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop Capital India!
